arts.ttl: Bayern and Marseille want Rashford - Tuesday's gossip
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Marseille are interested in Marcus Rashford, Manchester United are willing to listen to loan offers for Antony, plus more.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star joins Cole Palmer & Mo Salah in exclusive 3-man club
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha on Sunday secured for himself a place in an altogether high-profile club. As much came by way of his exploits in Barcelona’s La Liga meeting with Sevilla.…

arts.ttl: A surprise Barcelona star led both teams in dribbles in Sevilla clash
arts.sum: A surprise member of the defensive ranks at Barcelona managed to complete more dribbles than any other player on the pitch in the club’s most recent outing. The player in…

arts.ttl: Harry Kane’s very German hat-trick...last seen at Bayern Munich from Robert Lewandowski
arts.sum: Harry Kane’s second-half hat-trick at the weekend didn’t just secure Bayern a win over VfB Stuttgart — it earned Kane a lupenreiner hat-trick, or ‘perfect’ hat-trick in German. A fitting, and very German day from the England captain, right as the Champions League brings Bayern and Lewandowski back together again.

arts.ttl: The all-time record Real Madrid could match against Barcelona in El Clasico
arts.sum: A narrow 2-1 win over Celta Vigo on Saturday night stretched Madrid's unbeaten record to 42 league games - one short of the record that Barcelona set between 2017 and 2018. Real Madrid are one game away from equalling La Liga's all-time record for consecutive unbeaten matches.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star returns to group training before Barcelona showdown
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid were on Monday afforded a timely boost on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Brahim Díaz has rejoined group training alongside the rest…

arts.ttl: Barcelona & Real Madrid learn identity of referee for El Clásico
arts.sum: The identity of the referee set to be placed in charge of this weekend’s first Clásico of the campaign has on Monday been revealed. The official set to be tasked…

arts.ttl: Barca offer fitness updates on De Jong and Eric Garcia
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick offered updates on Eric Garcia and Frenkie de Jong after Sunday’s win over Sevilla . Flick was pushed further on De Jong and hinted he could play against Bayern on Wednesday night in the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany downplays Champions League clash with FC Barcelona
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany may have a no-holds barred approach to playing intensity, but the Bayern Munich head coach is keeping an even keel ahead of this week’s momentous Champions League clash vs. We are playing against Barcelona now and it’s important because that’s our next game.

arts.ttl: Joshua Kimmich on prospect of winning the 2025 UEFA Nations League
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich was recently asked on the goal to win the group. Last time at the Euros, winning the group didn’t help us that much, but rather put us on a more difficult path with the quarter-final against Spain.
